name: Lotsa Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Devil's food cake mix (without pudding included)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. In a large bowl, combine cake mix, pudding mix, eggs, oil, sour cream, and 1/2 cup water. Beat with an electric mixer on low speed just until blended. Beat on medium speed for 4 minutes, scraping down sides of the bowl often. Stir in chocolate chips. Turn batter into a well-greased 12-cup bundt pan. Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool for 10-15 minutes in the pan, then invert onto a rack or serving plate and let cool completely. Sift powdered sugar over top.
Variation: Mocha Orange Chocolate Cake
Before beating, add 1/4 cup coffee-flavored liqueur and 2 tablespoons grated orange zest to cake mix along with other ingredients. Proceed as directed in the recipe above.
Variation: Mocha Orange Chocolate Cake
Before beating, add 1/4 cup raspberry-flavored liqueur to cake mix along with other ingredients. After adding chips to batter, gently mix in 1/2 cup raspberry jam. Proceed as directed in the recipe above.
Variation: Peanut Butter Pudding Cake
Substitute 1 (4-1/8 oz) package instant chocolate peanut butter chip pudding and pie filling mix for chocolate fudge or chocolate pudding mix. Use 1-1/2 cups or 2 cups peanut butter-flavored chips instead of chocolate chips. Proceed as directed in the recipe above.
